pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version compatible with Java 21 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugin versions may fail to compile or recognize Java 21 language features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated source/target configuration with the modern release flag for cross-compilation support.
pom.xml.why_exists: Using source/target with Java 21 can lead to mismatched API usage or deprecation warnings; release flag ensures correct bootstrap classpath.

src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/bean/.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 17+ serialization best practices enforced by Java 21.
src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/bean/.why_exists: Java 21 (and Java 17+) enforces stricter checks on serialization fields; without @Serial, the compiler may issue warnings or errors depending on configuration, and it is a required migration step for clean compilation on newer JDKs.

src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/bean/.general_idea: Import the java.io.Serial class to support the @Serial annotation.
src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/bean/.why_exists: The @Serial annotation is defined in java.io.Serial; without this import, the code will fail to compile on Java 21.

src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/bean/.general_idea: Add @Serial annotation to serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 17+ serialization best practices enforced by Java 21 tooling.
src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/bean/.why_exists: Java 21 (and modern linters/compilers) may warn or error if @Serial is missing on serialVersionUID, as it is a special field defined by the Serializable interface.

src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/bean/.general_idea: Import java.io.Serial to support the new annotation on serialVersionUID.
src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/bean/.why_exists: Compilation error: cannot find symbol class Serial.
